a:r.a:t: Design tool → 2D production drawing (AutoCAD DWG/DXF) → registered in the API-built PLM
drawing & standard check: title block, layers, refs
linked to Block B12 / Panel P3
AVEVA Draw issues the 2D production drawing (DWG/DXF) from the E3D/Marine model;
the API-built PLM registers it with its MTO, AI-checks drawing standards, and tracks revision & status across the digital thread.
